basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026 - Walkin for Research Assistant and Data Entry Operator Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur
basic_details.post_name: Research Assistant (Project Technician Support - III) and Data Entry Operator
basic_details.short_information: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Gorakhpur (AIIMS Gorakhpur) Research Assistant (Project Technician Support - III) and Data Entry Operator Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of AIIMS Gorakhpur. A total of 2 vacancies have been announced through the AIIMS Gorakhpur Research Assistant (Project Technician Support - III) and Data Entry Operator Recruitment 2026.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years for Project Technical Support - III, Max: 25 years for Data entry Operator
age_limit.details: Maximum age limit for Project Technical Support - III is 35 years. Maximum age limit for Data Entry Operator is 25 years. Age relaxation will be as per ICMR guidelines. All candidates with desirable experience may be provided age relaxation based on experience. Age relaxation is admissible to SC/ST/OBC candidates in respect of posts reserved for respective category only and not for unreserved post as per GoI rules.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation Medical Science, Public health, Life sciences, Pharmacy, Nursing, Social Sciences, Social Work, Microbiology
qualification.details: Research Assistant (Project Technician Support - III): Three Year Graduation in relevant subjects/field (Preferably Medical Science, Public health, Life sciences, Pharmacy, Nursing, Social Sciences, Social Work, Microbiology) + three year experience or PG in relevant subject/field. Data Entry Operator: Intermediate or 12th pass from recognized board. Relevant experience in MS word, MS excel, Data management (Previous experience in research project will be preferred).

salary_details.details: Research Assistant (Project Technician Support - III): Rs. 33600 (including HRA) Per Month Data Entry Operator: Rs. 17000 Per Month

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to attend the walk-in interview for AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview for the AIIMS Gorakhpur recruitment will be held on 23 May 2026. Candidates are advised to reach the venue well in advance for registration.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for the AIIMS Gorakhpur Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: There are a total of 2 vacancies announced for the AIIMS Gorakhpur recruitment. These are for the posts of Research Assistant (Project Technician Support - III) and Data Entry Operator.

faq.question: Q3. What is the educational qualification required for the Data Entry Operator post?
faq.answer: For the Data Entry Operator post, candidates must have passed Intermediate or 12th from a recognized board and possess relevant experience in MS Word and MS Excel. Previous experience in a research project is preferred.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary offered for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Assistant (Project Technician Support - III) post will receive a salary of Rs. 33600 per month, which includes HRA.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, as per the provided information, there is no application fee for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the maximum age limit for the Research Assistant post?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Research Assistant (Project Technician Support - III) post is 35 years.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Gorakhpur recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process for these posts will be based on a walk-in interview. Candidates need to attend the interview with all required documents.

faq.question: Q8. Where will the walk-in interview be conducted?
faq.answer: The walk-in interview will be conducted at the AIIMS Gorakhpur office. Specific details regarding the venue and timing should be confirmed from the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. What documents should I carry for the walk-in interview?
faq.answer: Candidates must carry all original documents, including ID proof, educational certificates, experience certificates, and category certificates (if applicable), along with one set of self-attested photocopies.

faq.question: Q10. Is this a permanent government job?
faq.answer: No, this is a contractual job opportunity at AIIMS Gorakhpur. The employment will be on a contractual basis.
